creator: ryo@aquahill.net
text:
Hi,

On Thu, 3 Aug 2006 21:17:54 UT, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Please note that PR ports/101321 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.

I approve the patch and the alternation of maintainer, so
I'm glad you'll proceed, thanks. 

-- 
R.Okamoto <ryo@aquahill.net>
